basic_info.name: Sanya Atlantis Aquaventure Waterpark Wave Pool (三亚·亚特兰蒂斯水世界浪池)
basic_info.location: Atlantis Sanya Resort, Haitang Bay National Coast, Sanya, Hainan Province, China
basic_info.operator: Atlantis Sanya (operated by Kerzner International on behalf of owner Fosun Tourism Group / Fosun International)

technical_specs.wave_technology_brand: Murphy's Waves (wave generation system); pool designed by HAS of Texas [uncertain]
technical_specs.pool_size: Approximately 7,000 m² wave pool (some sources cite 6,400 m²) [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_height: Approximately 0.3-1.5 m, family-oriented recreational waves (not designed for stand-up surfing) [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_height_adjustability: Yes - 7 different wave modes/patterns are programmable, ranging from calm pool conditions to larger swells; specific tier names not publicly published [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_types: Recreational rolling waves and white-water surge waves for floating, bobbing, and bodyboarding; not shaped for surfing barrels or open-face rides
technical_specs.waves_per_hour: [uncertain] - operates in cycles with rest intervals; not publicly documented
technical_specs.wave_count_per_set: [uncertain] - cycles between active wave modes and calm intervals on a programmed schedule; specific set count not published
technical_specs.session_length: Continuous access during park operating hours (no per-session limits); wave cycles run intermittently throughout the day [uncertain]
technical_specs.stance_rotation_schedule: N/A - not a surfing-focused pool; no Goofy/Regular rotation
technical_specs.wave_type_classification: Artificial recreational wave pool (Murphy's Waves family-style), not a dedicated surf-shaped wave pool

pricing_sessions.price_range: Aquaventure Waterpark day ticket from approximately RMB 198-338 for adults (varies by season and platform); child ticket from RMB 258; included free for hotel guests of Atlantis Sanya. Wave pool access is included in the general waterpark admission
pricing_sessions.session_skill_tiers: N/A - no skill-tiered surf sessions; single general admission grants access to wave pool
pricing_sessions.equipment_rental: Life jackets provided free of charge; bodyboards/inflatable tubes available for rent or use within the park [uncertain on exact fees]
pricing_sessions.coaching_fee: N/A - no surf coaching offered at the wave pool; the pool is recreational only
pricing_sessions.membership_program: Atlantis Sanya offers annual passes and resort membership through Fosun's Club Med-affiliated programs; specific waterpark-only membership pricing varies seasonally [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.corporate_team_building: Yes - Atlantis Sanya offers MICE/team-building packages including waterpark buyouts and group event hosting via the resort's events department

experience_guide.best_season: Year-round operation (only year-round waterpark in China); peak experience April-October when air and water temperatures are warmest; avoid Chinese national holidays (Spring Festival, Golden Week, summer school holidays) for shorter queues
experience_guide.crowd_level: Very high during Chinese public holidays and July-August summer school break; moderate on weekends; lower on weekdays in shoulder season (March, May, September, November). Wave pool can be heavily crowded during peak wave shows
experience_guide.booking_method: Online pre-purchase strongly recommended; tickets sold on official website, OTA platforms, and at park gate
experience_guide.booking_platform: Atlantis Sanya official website (atlantissanya.com), Ctrip/Trip.com, Fliggy, Meituan/Dianping, Klook, KKday, WeChat Mini Program
experience_guide.payment_options: Alipay, WeChat Pay, UnionPay, international credit cards (Visa/Mastercard/Amex), cash (RMB)
experience_guide.skill_required: Zero - no surfing skill required; suitable for non-swimmers in shallow areas with life jackets
experience_guide.age_eligibility: Children under 0.9 m height free; 0.9-1.22 m children's ticket; over 1.22 m adult ticket. Children under 13 require adult supervision. Some thrill rides have minimum 1.22 m height requirement; wave pool itself accessible to all ages with supervision
experience_guide.child_friendly_score: 5 - highly child-friendly; shallow zero-entry edges, life jackets provided free, adjacent Splashers children's play zone, lifeguards posted around the wave pool
experience_guide.sup_paddleboard_offering: Not offered within the wave pool [uncertain]
experience_guide.photography_video_service: On-site professional photographers and ride photo capture available at major slides; photo packages sold at park exit kiosks; pricing varies [uncertain on exact rates]
experience_guide.language_support: Yes - English, Mandarin, Cantonese, and Russian language support available at guest services; multilingual signage throughout the park
experience_guide.accessibility_for_disabled: Limited - wheelchair accessibility for general pathways and viewing areas; no dedicated adaptive surfing program; specific accessibility features for wave pool entry not publicly documented [uncertain]
experience_guide.stance_preference_input: N/A - not a surf training pool
experience_guide.safety_notes: Lifeguards posted at all pools per international waterpark safety standards; mandatory life jackets for non-swimmers and children; wave cycle warnings broadcast before each set; pregnant women, those with heart conditions, or recent surgery patients advised against the wave pool. Insurance included in ticket per Chinese theme park regulations
experience_guide.events_competitions_calendar: Hosts in-pool entertainment shows (DJ sets, live music, fire-dance, acrobatics on the central stage) seasonally; does not host competitive surfing events

surroundings.nearby_accommodation: Haitang Bay area hotels including Conrad Sanya, Park Hyatt Sanya, Shangri-La Sanya, Kempinski Haitang Bay, Mandarin Oriental Sanya - typical rates RMB 1,500-5,000+ per night
surroundings.on_site_accommodation: Atlantis Sanya Hotel - 1,314 rooms and suites including Underwater Suites with Ambassador Lagoon views; rates from approximately RMB 2,000 standard room to RMB 100,000+ for signature underwater suites; waterpark and aquarium access included for hotel guests
surroundings.nearby_food: Atlantis Sanya houses 21 in-house restaurants and bars (Ossiano underwater dining, Bread Street Kitchen by Gordon Ramsay, Seafire steakhouse, Ling Long Chinese, etc.); Haitang Bay Duty Free Shopping Mall (CDF Mall) nearby with extensive dining; Haitang Bay Shilipuxin food street
surroundings.transport: Self-drive (resort parking available), taxi/Didi, hotel shuttle from Sanya Phoenix International Airport (SYX), tour bus services from Sanya city
surroundings.transport_to_nearest_airport: Approximately 35-40 km / 45-50 minutes drive from Sanya Phoenix International Airport (SYX); approximately 25 km from Sanya City center; close to Haitang Bay High-Speed Railway Station (5-10 minutes drive)
surroundings.combined_itinerary: Combine with Haitang Bay CDF Duty Free Mall shopping, Wuzhizhou Island day trip, Yalong Bay beaches, Sanya Bay sunset, Nanshan Buddhism Cultural Park; multi-day Atlantis stay packages bundle waterpark, aquarium, dolphin/sealion encounters, and underwater dining

pros: Year-round indoor/outdoor operation - China's only all-year waterpark
Massive 200,000 m² waterpark with 36 slides and major attractions beyond the wave pool
Wave pool features live entertainment stage with DJs, music, and performances
Free for Atlantis Sanya hotel guests with multi-day re-entry
Family-friendly with strong safety oversight, free life jackets, and supervised play zones
cons: Extremely crowded during Chinese national holidays and summer school break - long slide queues
Wave pool is recreational only - not suitable for stand-up surfing or skill development
Premium pricing compared to local Hainan waterparks
Locker, food, and photo upsells add significantly to total spend
Wave intensity is mild and family-oriented; advanced surfers will find it underwhelming
reviews_reputation.user_reviews: Dianping (大众点评) average rating approximately 4.5-4.7/5; Xiaohongshu (小红书) abundant positive coverage praising the visual scale, wave pool ambiance, and themed atmosphere; Mafengwo (马蜂窝) and Ctrip reviews highlight the wave pool's entertainment shows and family suitability while noting peak-season crowding [uncertain on exact current scores]
reviews_reputation.recommended_for: Families with children, leisure tourists, photo/social-media visitors, hotel guests at Atlantis Sanya, corporate group buyouts; NOT recommended for serious surfers seeking training waves
reviews_reputation.operator_brand_partnership: Atlantis brand owned by Kerzner International (UAE/Bahamas heritage); Atlantis Sanya is owned by Fosun Tourism Group (Fosun International), with Kerzner providing brand and management. Wave technology by Murphy's Waves (UK); slides by ProSlide Technology (Canada); waterpark designed by HAS of Texas (USA)

https://blooloop.com/water-parks/in-depth/atlantis-sanya-aquaventure-hainan-island/ - Blooloop in-depth feature confirming opening date, designers, Murphy's Waves wave system
